ordinanceLabel: Tehama Municipal Code (Title 15/17, Municode — unverified) | Tehama County Ord. 2127 | 2025 CBSC in effect
buildingDeptAddress: 633 Washington Street, Room 29, Red Bluff, CA 96080
fireAgencyNote: Fire prevention plan check handled through Tehama County Building Department (contracted); TGU provides fire suppression
healthAuthorityAddress: 1850 Walnut Street, Suite A, Red Bluff, CA 96080
airDistrict: Tehama County Air Pollution Control District (TCAPCD)
muniCodeScrapeNote: JS-rendered SPA — WebFetch returns init scripts only. Human must access Municode manually for Title 15 and Title 17.
fhszNote: City is on Sacramento Valley floor — no FHSZ designation within city limits. CAL FIRE FHSZ Viewer should be consulted for parcels near city boundaries.
floodZone: FEMA Zone A (100-year flood zone) — all city land
floodZoneNote: All construction in the City of Tehama requires elevation above BFE and Elevation Certificate. Flood elevation sign-off from the City of Tehama is required before certificate of occupancy from county.
cityVsCountyPermits: City of Tehama contracts with Tehama County Building Department for all building permit processing. No standalone city building dept. City reviews site layout, setbacks, and flood elevations only.
localAmendmentOrd: Tehama County Ord. 2127 (county); City Title 15 (Municode, unverified)
localAmendmentContent: unknown — Municode scrape blocked for city Title 15
waterUtility: City of Tehama (municipal water and sewer within city limits)
